burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; cosmetic and compressive symptoms in some cases

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical neck exam and thyroid ultrasound; TSH evaluation

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions with goiter or nodular thyroid
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with monitoring and iodine balance programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound and lab testing widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation, treat iodine imbalance; surgery for compressive cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Variation in iodine intake and access to endocrine care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong iodine surveillance and endocrinology services
